fields.name: addresseeName
fields.description: Adressee name (e.g. in case of emergency purpose it corresponds to name of the person to be contacted).

fields.name: countryCode
fields.description: Country code of the country (ISO3166-1). E.g. "US" for the United States

fields.name: countryCallingCode
fields.description: Country calling code of the phone number, as defined by the International Communication Union. Examples - "1" for US, "371" for Latvia.

fields.name: areaCode
fields.description: Corresponds to a regional code or a city code. The length of the field varies depending on the area.

fields.name: number
fields.description: Phone number. Composed of digits only. The number of digits depends on the country.

fields.name: text
fields.description: String containing the full phone number - applicable only when a structured phone (i.e. countryCallingCode + number) is not provided
